summary: All P0/P1 features implemented. Transform Output Preview, Dashboard sampling fix, Destination validation, Tooltips, Auto-save, Password strength, and non-structured data ETL (flatten/nested JSON) all working. 83 tests passing. Build passes (371KB JS, 27KB CSS). npm audit: 0 vulnerabilities. Coverage gap (11.32% overall) is due to frontend having no unit tests; core ETL transform logic has 95%+ coverage.
